Item Class: Waystones
Rarity: Rare
Ghastly Panorama
Waystone (Tier 15)
--------
Revives Available: 0 (augmented)
Item Rarity: +15% (augmented)
Pack Size: +16% (augmented)
Monster Rarity: +36% (augmented)
Monster Effectiveness: +13% (augmented)
Waystone Drop Chance: +95% (augmented)
--------
Item Level: 81
--------
{ Prefix Modifier "Fleeting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 13(10-15)% increased Attack, Cast and Movement Speed
{ Prefix Modifier "Impacting" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters have 96(90-100)% increased Stun Buildup
{ Prefix Modifier "Profane" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters deal 18(15-19)% of Damage as Extra Chaos
{ Suffix Modifier "of Obstruction" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters take 26(26-30)% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Hits
{ Suffix Modifier "Shocking" (Tier: 1) }
Area has patches of Shocked Ground — Unscalable Value
{ Suffix Modifier "of Enduring" (Tier: 1) }
Monsters are Armoured
--------
Can be used in a Map Device, allowing you to enter a Map. Waystones can only be used once.
--------
Corrupted
